mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cafe_orders ( visit_session_id, seat_no, status, subtotal, tax, total, created_at, updated_at, paid_at ) VALUES ( #{visitSessionId}, #{seatNo}, #{status}, #{subtotal}, #{tax}, #{total}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{paidAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, visit_session_id, seat_no, status, subtotal, tax, total, created_at, updated_at, paid_at FROM cafe_orders WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, visit_session_id, seat_no, status, subtotal, tax, total, created_at, updated_at, paid_at FROM cafe_orders ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
